change.summary: Consume producer-emitted truth fields and remove duplicated consumer logic.
change.scope_notes: Use for a producer -> dashboard truth/schema dogfood PR.

secrets_scan.summary: No secret-bearing files expected; update if workflow/env/config files change.

permission_diff.summary: No workflow, Tauri permission, connector, or agent-access change expected.

redaction.summary: No screenshots attached by default; mark fixture-backed or redacted if added.

rollback.path: Revert the PR; keep producer/consumer fallback behavior documented.

commands.summary: TypeScript typecheck for the dashboard app.
Tauri/Rust shell check for IPC and file-load changes.
